title: failure classification and retry dedup unification
goal: failure_type の正規化と同一原因リトライ停止を一つの基準に統合する
constraints: must preserve existing runtime flow unless failure classification requires guard refinement
must select exactly one canonical failure_type
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: failure classification and retry dedup path only
backend/tests/*: canonical failure and retry stop coverage only
